reviews.comment:
Buen lugar. Tomé un desayuno, buena atención. Precio razonable. Baños limpios en buen estado. Aceptan pago en efectivo, tarjeta de débito y tarjeta de crédito.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place. I had breakfast there, good service. Reasonable price. Clean and well-maintained restrooms. They accept cash, debit, and credit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPeXUyMThRRRAB
